docs.title: About Me
docs.text: I am a student at Colby College, majoring in Studio Arts with a focus in Digital. I am passionate about buiding a career in UX/UI Design in the technology industry, and ma excited by the opportunities and challenges emergin with the advent of AI.

docs.title: Welcome to my Portfolio!
docs.text:
• Student at Colby College
  • Lake Oswego, Oregon

Check me out on LinkedIn!

docs.title: Lap and Dowel
docs.text: For a project in a sculpture course at Colby, I wanted to make something both useful and creative: a new twist on a wooden table. I aimed for a minimalist design and a structure that would defy gravity. The table rests on the sill of a window, turning an outdoor space into a functional surface. To achieve the simplicity, I used a carpenter’s joinery techniques like lapped and dowel joints. The dowel joint makes the leg detachable, making the table portable and easily stored.

docs.title: Black and White
docs.text: This is a sampling of pieces I created in white and black cardstock for a class in 2D art.

docs.title: Movie Theater App
docs.text:
I created this portfolio as a part of Google’s seven-course series in UX/UI design on Coursera. The portfolio illustrates not only my design of an e-commerce app using Figma, but also the steps in my design process, from ideation and building wireframes to prototyping, UX research, and concept testing.

Check out my work!
